verse.name: v1
verse.lines: "Almost persuaded," Now to believe; "Almost persuaded," Christ to receive; Seems now some soul to say, "Go, Spirit, go Thy way, Some more convenient day On Thee I'll call."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: "Almost persuaded," Come, come today; "Almost persuaded," Turn not away; Jesus invites you here, Angels are ling'ring near, Prayers rise from hearts so dear, Oh wand'rer, come.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: "Almost persuaded," Harvest is past! "Almost persuaded," Doom comes at last! "Almost" cannot avail; "Almost" is but to fail! Sad, sad, that bitter wail, "Almost," but lost!
